---
title: "Day 5"
---

## Question One

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
set.seed(123)
x<- tibble(
  value = rnorm(100, mean=3, sd=1))
ggplot(x,aes(x=value))+
  geom_density(linewidth=1, fill ='blue', alpha =0.4)+ labels(title = 'Empirical Density of Normal Random numbers', x='Value',y='Density'
                                                              caption = '100 simualted observations from ~N(3,1) ') #+ theme_minimal()
```
